title: Add agent tooling: recap-writer, paper-researcher, /recap, guard hooks
description: Wire .claude/ subagents + slash command + hooks so the in-loop agent in tsp_research/ has: auto-recap (every 4 cycles), paper/algorithm research subagent, hard-blocks for prepare.py edits and dep installs.

title: Add scipy+numba, ideas.md library, git init for branches
description: Pre-approve scipy/numba in pyproject; create ideas.md seed library with sample/grow protocol; commit scaffold to outer repo as base for tsp/<tag> branches.
close_reason: scipy+numba added to pyproject and synced (scipy 1.15.3, numba 0.65.1). ideas.md created with seeded library across 7 classes plus sample+grow protocol. program.md updated to reference ideas.md. Outer auto-rez repo committed (dd8df32 on main); branch tsp/apr25 created from there as the agent's working branch.

title: Scaffold tsp_research framework
description: Build autoresearch-style harness for Santa 2018 TSP: frozen prepare.py (data loader + score_tour), solve.py playground, program.md, results.tsv loop.
close_reason: Scaffolded tsp_research/: prepare.py (frozen, score_tour validated), solve.py (NN baseline 1.81M cost, 174s), program.md, README.md, pyproject.toml, .gitignore. Baseline run completed inside budget.
